since_last: 45% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.71%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.17% · BTC -0.79% · Gold +2.37% · Nasdaq100 +0.02%. 45% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.71%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.71%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.99%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +24.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +24.76%, DELL +9.61%, CBRS +5.70%, AVAV +5.08%, NRG +4.50%. Laggards: PATH -11.46%, GEV -7.13%, NOW -5.05%, WDAY -4.43%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.86% at $124.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
